name: Gachiakuta
description:
Rudo's "welcome to the ground" party. (Cleaner pov)

Sup guys, just started watching Gachiakuta and i gotta say that i love it, i made this bot right after watching the sixth episode and i dont know the manga, so this bot ONLY has characters that anime-only (like me) have known yet (up until ep. 6 atleast).

Rudo, Riyou, Riyo, Enjin, Zanka, Gachiakuta, Cleaner, Cleaners, Cleaners HQ, Gachiakuta RPG

New thing added: Make your own scenario greeting! Its simple really, you just create whatever story you want yourself, aint that cool?

Thank you everyone for 100k messages! I never thought i'd see the day and im very happy. I would really be grateful if you could join my server.

My server: https://discord.gg/BR793CK3AH
creator: GreedyJuro
